texto: I'd like to get out of Philadelphia. I don't care for the people or their attitude, although they don't bother me or my play. But maybe the Phillies can get a couple of broken bats and shower shoes for me.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Richie Allen: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I'd like to get out of Philadelphia. I don't care for the people or their attitude, although they…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, shoes, me pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de me e people.

frase_original: I'd like to get out of Philadelphia. I don't care for the people or their attitude, although they don't bother me or my play. But maybe the Phillies can get a couple of broken bats and shower shoes for me.
